subject: Property Law
module: Licences, Proprietary Estoppel and Rights of Residence

lessons.title: Types of Licences
lessons.description: There are four types of licence. The first is the bare licence.

lessons.title: Contractual Licences
lessons.description: A contractual licence arises wherever a person is given permission to be on or use land under a contract supported by consideration.

lessons.title: Proprietary Estoppel
lessons.description: The core elements of proprietary estoppel are three. First, a representation or assurance by the owner that the claimant has or will have rights over the land.

lessons.title: Rights of Residence
lessons.description: A right of residence is typically created by a deed of transfer or a will in favour of a family member, most commonly an elderly parent who transfers the family farm or home to a child on the condition that the child provides the parent with accommodation and support during their lifetime.
